_comment: Canonical WoW flavor (game edition) table. Single source of truth shared by the Python generators (scripts/flavor.py) and AddonSentry, which ships this file via COPY wow-api /opt/wow-api. label = the human-facing edition name AddonSentry surfaces (manifest catalog, marketing site); project_id = the in-game WOW_PROJECT_ID; aliases_toc = TOC filename suffixes the client recognizes (bare/no-suffix => mainline); interface_min/max = the interface-number range that maps to this flavor; wow_root = the install-dir name used to locate SavedVariables. NOTE: mists project_id is provisional - confirm against the raw WOW_PROJECT_ID the dumper records and correct here.
